messages.content: u good bro? that armbar was nasty 🔥
bro u almost had that sweep too
yooo that north south choke tho 💀
that was dirty lol caught me off guard
had to bro my neck was done haha
nah im good just a little sore nothing crazy
for real? u were movin slow at the end thursday
nah just tight from that last roll
that knee slice was clean tho 🔥
u do anything last night or just chill
ordered food and put on some music lol
bro that was a war tonight 🔥🔥
no cap that last round was brutal
ur guard game gettin nasty tho fr
appreciate that man been working on it
yeah all good 💪 just gonna stretch it out tmrw
u seemed a lil stiff in teh first round tho u ok?
just warming up lol takes a minute at 42
💀💀 nah but fr u looked solid by the end

yo bro real talk tho. u looked stiff getting up after that last scramble thursday. u seeing anybody for that? my boy goes to this sports rehab place off lamar and swears by it. want me to send u his info
Good first night tonight. Glad you were there brother
Agreed. Marcus's story was something else
Been working on it. Got some good stuff I think
Hey brother. Praying for you tomorrow night. You ready?
I think so. Little nervous but I've been prepping
God's going to use your story. Just be you
Brother, that was powerful. Thank you for being vulnerable.
Appreciate you, Deon. Means a lot.
I mean it. A few people came up to me after and said your story really spoke to them
What a series. Thank you for being part of this
James was really inspired by your talk. Appreciate you brother
Man that means a lot. He emailed me today actually
I thought he might. He was asking me about it after service Sunday
Gonna send him some general stuff tomorrow morning
Good. He's in a good spot to hear it right now
That's the fruit right there. Your story planted something
Yeah sent it this morning. Kept it high level
Also thinking about doing a monthly check-in with the group starting this month
Good. I'll send something to the group this weekend

Hey Isaiah. Quick thing — a brother from men's ministry, James Whitfield, does financial planning. He's offering free consultations to anyone at GracePoint this month. Since you mentioned getting more serious about retirement, thought you'd want to know. Want me to pass along your number?
Got it. Same time at Ramsey?
Can't, work deadline. Maybe next time.
Game tonight. Derek and Marcus coming.
Gonna have to pass. Next one for sure.
Playoff watch party at Marcus's Saturday.
Coming down with something, gonna sit this one out.
Got a thing. Can't make it.
Yeah been crazy busy. Work stuff.
Hey! League playoffs are Saturday at the rec center, 2pm tip-off. Marcus and Derek are both playing. Would be great to see you out there, it's been a minute 🏀 You free?
bet let me check the weather
its gonna be perfect i already looked 😊
works for me. ill head out early
same ill leave from sa. meet at the trailhead?
my legs are gonna hate me tomorrow lol
it was so pretty. glad u planned the route
def down u pick the spot
cedar fever is killing me already
lol same its brutal down here too
went thru half a box of tissues at work todya
just ordered it off amazon. zyrtec too
lol of course you did. u probly have a whole allergy season protocol
cool ill map out the trail
u want to get lost out there?
perfect ill drive up from sa
this is so you planning the perfect route lol
told u it was worth it
ok i admit it the falls were insane
barely?? i was dyign on that last hill
for real. maybe lost maples next
oo yes spring tho when everything is green
when does cedar season end again
its been bad this year for real
my eyes been watering all week
same honestly i look like ive been crying at work
i think we survived cedar szn 🎉
but yeah i havent sneezed in like 3 days
stopped the zyrtec yesterday seeing what happens
yo what u doing for ur birthday
thinking about driving down to sa
we should do dinner somewhere nice
that place is good ill make a res
haha ill leave around 10 be there by noon
u kept saying u wanted one lol
i already have like 4 books downloaded
love u too. text me when u get home
Drove past this aquarium shop in SA yesterday and immediately thought of you lol. How's Kingpin doing?? Also I keep seeing Amazon boxes every time we FaceTime 😂 what are you ordering now big bro
yo who trying to trade bam adebayo
need a guard bad. garland or fox
lol u buggin bam is not worth fox
ill do garland and terrence mann for him
take the deal tyrell thats fair
nah im good ill find something better
anyone wanna move a center? im loaded at guard
bro my team is EATING tonight
isaiah how is ur team this good
bro named his team after a fish
kingpin is royalty put some respect on it
did anyone else start shai tonight
started shai AND luka. big night
waiver wire closes tonight who yall grabbing
alex sarr if hes still there
gone bro i grabbed him yesterday 😂
i need a center bad. anyone dropping?
wait i was looking at him
playoffs in a month yall better figure it out
congrats isaiah. finals gonna be good
lol its just fantasy im good
i know that feeling marcus. tyrell got me last week
choke city vs kingpins court for the chip
well deserved man. good season everyone
great season. when we running it back
next year im coming for the crown 🔥
lottery obvi im not giving up the 1 pick lol
bro u won u should pick last
thats how it works champ picks last
Hey is this Isaiah? I got some mail here with your name on it
hey yeah thats me. anything important looking?
looks like a Chase statement and something from Fidelity
can u just shred those? i get everything online. thanks
Hey Isaiah, Carlos from the Meridian mixer last week. Good to meet you. Let me know if you want to grab coffee and talk about the ESG space.
Hey Carlos good meeting you too. Definitely, let me check my schedule and get back to you.
yo u still looking for a monitor
dell 27 inch curved 165hz. 120 if u want it
saturday pickup at ramsey? 10am. got 8 guys coming
might swing by ill let u know
bro the spurs are killing me
Hey brothers. Small group Thursday 7pm. Starting Proverbs this week. Chapter 3.
No group this Thursday. Im out of town. Back next week
Back on for Thursday. Proverbs 4 this week
new guy showed up tonight. dude was strong
that big dude? yeah he was legit
he got me in that kimura lol
happens to the best of us bro 💀
got a thing already, next time
Holiday lunch Dec 18 at Loro? Team is buying
should be able to make that
